summary: Tested UI restructure from 4 AI tabs to 2 tabs (ZETA and Judge Mini). All requested features working correctly: 2-tab structure, Oto Yaz and Derin Analiz buttons inside ZETA chat mode, back navigation, auto-write 1-7 page limit, Judge Mini with fast/deep modes and image upload.
critical_code_review_comments: 2-tab structure correctly implemented - only ZETA and Judge Mini tabs visible
Old 'Oto Yaz' and 'Derin' separate tabs successfully removed
Oto Yaz (green) and Derin Analiz (amber with 100kr) buttons placed above chat input in ZETA mode
Auto-write mode accessible via button with proper back navigation
Deep analysis mode accessible via button with proper back navigation
Auto-write page selector correctly limited to 1-7 pages
ZETA chat input remains functional - messages send and receive correctly
Judge Mini tab works with Hizli/Derin mode selector and image upload button
No image/photo upload button in ZETA input area as required
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI restructure complete. RightPanel.js has been rewritten with 2-tab structure. ZETA has zetaMode state ('chat', 'autowrite', 'deep') managed by action buttons. Judge Mini tab remains as before with fast/deep modes. Auto-write page limit is 1-7.
